name: plugin-average-score
module_doc_summary: Average-score analytics plugin with synthetic cohort benchmark families.
mapper_doc_summary: Emit per-student sum/count records from comma-separated score lines.
reducer_doc_summary: Return a rounded average score for one student key.
combiner_doc_summary: Merge shard-local sum/count objects before the final reduce step.
benchmark_generator_doc_summary: Generate deterministic cohort score fixtures for benchmark scenarios.
benchmark_note_hook_doc_summary: Describe the intended hot keys for each synthetic benchmark family.

name: plugin-service-latency
module_doc_summary: Service-latency summary plugin for observability-style benchmark demos.
mapper_doc_summary: Parse comma-separated service/latency rows into partial latency summaries.
reducer_doc_summary: Return count, average, p95, and max latency for one service key.
combiner_doc_summary: Merge shard-local latency summaries before the final reduce step.
benchmark_generator_doc_summary: Generate deterministic latency fixtures for multiple observability-style families.
benchmark_note_hook_doc_summary: Describe the intended hot services for each synthetic latency family.

name: plugin-sessionization
module_doc_summary: Sessionization analytics plugin for product-usage benchmark demos.
mapper_doc_summary: Emit per-user session events from comma-separated user,timestamp,page rows.
reducer_doc_summary: Summarize session count, duration, and activity intensity for one user.
combiner_doc_summary: Keep shard-local event batches JSON-safe before global sessionization.
benchmark_generator_doc_summary: Generate deterministic product-analytics event streams for sessionization demos.
benchmark_note_hook_doc_summary: Describe the intended hotspot users and browsing patterns for each family.

name: plugin-streaming-window
module_doc_summary: Streaming-window aggregation plugin for telemetry-style benchmark demos.
mapper_doc_summary: Emit per-stream, per-window summary objects from stream,timestamp,value rows.
reducer_doc_summary: Return window-level count, range, and rate metrics for one stream bucket.
combiner_doc_summary: Merge shard-local window summaries before the final reduce step.
benchmark_generator_doc_summary: Generate deterministic windowed telemetry fixtures for benchmark scenarios.
benchmark_note_hook_doc_summary: Describe the intended hot windows and portfolio story for each family.

name: plugin-max-score
module_doc_summary: Maximum-score reducer plugin for simple leaderboard-style demos.
mapper_doc_summary: Parse comma-separated score rows into integer leaderboard updates.
reducer_doc_summary: Return the overall maximum score for one student key.
combiner_doc_summary: Keep the shard-local maximum score for one student key.

name: plugin-watermark-late-summary
module_doc_summary: Watermark-aware late-event summary plugin for out-of-order stream-processing demos.
mapper_doc_summary: Emit per-stream event batches from stream,event_time,arrival_time,value rows.
reducer_doc_summary: Summarize watermark-aware acceptance, late updates, and dropped events for one stream.
combiner_doc_summary: Keep shard-local stream event batches JSON-safe before watermark evaluation.
benchmark_generator_doc_summary: Generate deterministic out-of-order event streams for watermark-summary demos.
benchmark_note_hook_doc_summary: Describe the intended late-event hotspot story for each synthetic family.
